header.title: Project Settings
header.subtitle: Review granted capabilities, project-level enablement, and member access from one document-style page.

basics.title: Project Basics
basics.description: Edit the active project's metadata here so the registry can stay lightweight and read-only for existing projects.
basics.presetHint: Presets seed the baseline project posture. Existing custom preset codes stay visible for compatibility.

validation.required: Enter a project name and resource directory.

models.title: Model Settings
models.description: Choose which workspace-configured models this project can use and set the default model.
models.allowedHint: Only the selected workspace models are available to this project.
models.defaultHint: New turns without an explicit model use this default selection.
models.totalTokensHint: Leave blank to keep this project unlimited.
models.usedTokensHint: Read-only usage synced from project runtime state.
models.saveError: Failed to save project model settings.
models.emptyTitle: No configured workspace models are available

validation.required: Select at least one allowed model.

tools.title: Tool Permissions
tools.description: Refine the assigned builtin, skill, and mcp tool set for this project and override permissions when needed.

tools.emptyDescription: Assign workspace tools to this project first, then return here to refine the enabled set.
tools.projectOwnedHint: Project-owned skills and MCP servers stay attached to this project automatically and are not controlled by workspace grants.

agents.agentsHint: Only assigned workspace agents can be enabled here.
agents.teamsHint: Only assigned workspace teams can be enabled here.

users.title: Project Members

search.emptyDescription: Try another tab or adjust the search query.

overview.title: Configuration Overview
overview.description: Project Settings now owns editable metadata, while the workspace registry only summarizes the project and links back here for deeper changes.
overview.editHint: Leader: {leader}. Lifecycle and deletion approval now live on this page.

capabilities.title: Capability Configuration
capabilities.description: Review workspace-granted scope, project-owned assets, and project-level disabled state for each capability class from one section.
capabilities.modelsValue: Workspace granted {workspaceGranted}, project enabled {enabled}, project disabled {disabled}, default {defaultModel}
capabilities.toolsValue: Workspace granted {workspaceGranted}, project-owned {projectOwned}, project enabled {enabled}, project disabled {disabled}, {overrides} overrides
capabilities.actorsValue: Workspace granted {workspaceGranted}, project-owned {projectOwned}, project enabled {enabled}, project disabled {disabled}

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle & Deletion
lifecycle.description: Archive, restore, and deletion approval all run from project settings so registry pages stay read-only.
lifecycle.reviewCallout: This project was opened from a deletion review deep-link. Review the request status and approve or reject it here.

grants.title: Available To This Project
grants.description: Grant the workspace-level capabilities that this project is allowed to see.

runtime.title: Enabled In This Project
runtime.description: Refine defaults, enabled scope, and project-level overrides inside the granted range.

members.title: Members & Access
members.description: Maintain project membership and explain that deeper ACL editing stays in access control.
members.accessHint: A full project ACL editor is out of scope for this round. This page only shows a summary and where to manage it.
members.accessEmpty: No project-level overrides. Access currently inherits from the workspace.

grantActors.teamsHint: This action only grants access. It does not enable them for runtime yet.

runtimeTools.title: Edit tool enablement & overrides
runtimeTools.description: Within the granted tool scope, choose the enabled tools and project-level overrides.

runtimeActors.agentsHint: Only agents already granted to this project appear here.
runtimeActors.teamsHint: Only teams already granted to this project appear here.
runtimeActors.projectOwnedDescription: Agents and teams created inside this project already belong to it and do not need an extra grant.

members.hint: This dialog only manages membership, not the full permission model.

dangerDialog.title: Enable Full Access Mode

dangerDialog.warningBody: Enabling Full Access mode means you fully trust this agent. When handling files, databases, or sensitive configurations, AI misoperation may result in data loss or environment damage. Proceed with caution and ensure necessary backups are made.

header.title: Workspace Model Center
header.subtitle: Manage explicitly created workspace model instances and configure a name, ApiKey, base URL, and budget policy for each one.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search name, provider, model, family, track, or capability…

detail.name: Name
detail.credentialRefPlaceholder: Enter a new ApiKey; leave empty to keep the current one
detail.noCapabilities: This model does not declare capabilities.
detail.noSurfaces: This model has no enabled surfaces.
detail.noDescription: This model does not include a description.

sections.overviewDescription: Maintain the base identity and source information for this workspace model instance.
sections.authenticationDescription: Distinguish whether credentials come from a model override, provider inheritance, or are missing, and show secure-storage health.
sections.executionProfileDescription: Inspect the real runtime class, session eligibility, upstream streaming truth, tool-loop truth, and enabled surfaces for this model instance.
sections.budgetPolicyDescription: Maintain total budget, accounting mode, traffic classes, warning thresholds, and reservation strategy for this model instance.
sections.validationDescription: Run a real request validation and keep the latest result instead of relying on transient toasts only.
sections.capabilitiesDescription: List the capabilities declared by this model for runtime selection and orchestration.

create.title: Create model configuration
create.description: Create a workspace model instance and bind a name, provider, upstream model, and ApiKey.

placeholders.modelId: Enter a model identifier, e.g. llama3.1:8b

errors.required: Name, provider, and model are required.
errors.duplicateName: Model names must be unique inside the workspace.
errors.customProviderNameRequired: A custom provider name is required in custom mode.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save the model configuration.

security.inputHint: A new ApiKey is written only to the local encrypted secret store. Runtime JSON keeps only the generated secret reference.
security.createHint: After creation, the ApiKey is stored in the local encrypted secret store and never written to runtime JSON in plaintext.

sourceDescriptions.configured-model-override: This model instance explicitly overrides the provider credential. After save it will resolve through a model-level secure reference.
sourceDescriptions.provider-inherited: This model instance does not override credentials, so runtime inherits the provider credential from {provider}.
sourceDescriptions.missing: Neither this model instance nor its provider currently has an available credential. Add one before saving or validating.

descriptions.missing: No ApiKey is currently configured for this model.
descriptions.configured: The current ApiKey is hidden. Re-enter and save it to the local encrypted secret store.
descriptions.pending-save: A new ApiKey has been entered and will be written to the local encrypted secret store after save.
descriptions.environment-variable: This model currently resolves its ApiKey from an environment variable.
descriptions.environment-variable-missing: The referenced environment variable is missing. Fix it before validating or saving.
descriptions.system-managed: This model's ApiKey is already stored in the local encrypted secret store.
descriptions.system-managed-missing: The local encrypted secret store no longer has this ApiKey. Enter a new one and save.
descriptions.migration-failed: A legacy plaintext ApiKey was detected, but writing it into the local encrypted secret store failed. Enter a new ApiKey before continuing.
descriptions.inline-redacted: A legacy plaintext ApiKey was detected and hidden. Enter a new ApiKey before continuing.
descriptions.reference-error: The current secure reference cannot be resolved. Enter a new ApiKey before continuing.

validation.idleDescription: After you click Validate, the latest probe result will be shown here.
validation.success: Real request completed. Model "{name}" is available and this check consumed {tokens} tokens.

messages.unknownRuntimeConfigKey: The runtime config includes an unknown key: {key}.
messages.deprecatedRuntimeConfigKey: The runtime config key {key} is deprecated. Use {replacement} instead.
messages.missingConfiguredCredentialEnv: Environment variable {envKey} is missing, so {providerId} cannot connect.
messages.runtimeConfigMustBeObject: The runtime config document must be a JSON object.
messages.runtimePatchMustBeObject: The runtime config patch must be a JSON object.
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save the model configuration.
messages.secureStorageWriteFailed: Writing the ApiKey to the local encrypted secret store failed. Verify that the workspace data directory is writable and try again.
messages.createFailed: Failed to create the model configuration.
messages.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the model configuration.
messages.secretCleanupFailed: The model was deleted, but ApiKey cleanup did not finish.
messages.migrationBlocked: This ApiKey must be repaired before you can save or validate.
messages.noWorkspaceConnection: No active workspace connection is available.
messages.workspaceOnly: This page only supports workspace runtime configuration.
messages.runtimeWarning: The runtime config still has warnings to review.

validation.successBody: "{name}" passed the real request validation and consumed {tokens} tokens.

save.successBody: The workspace model configuration for "{name}" was updated.

create.successBody: "{name}" was added to the workspace model configuration.

delete.successBody: "{name}" was removed from the workspace model configuration.
delete.warningBody: "{name}" was deleted, but the ApiKey cleanup in the local encrypted secret store did not finish: {message}

execution.profileReadyDescription: This model is eligible for agent sessions because it exposes the native conversation runtime with upstream streaming and tool-loop support.
execution.profileGenerationDescription: This model is limited to the dedicated single-shot generation path and should not be treated as a normal agent-session runtime option.
execution.profileUnsupportedDescription: This model does not currently expose an executable runtime surface.

summary.title: Updates & Version Center

metrics.currentVersionHelper: The version currently installed on this device.
metrics.lastCheckedHelper: The app checks once on startup and can always be checked again manually.
metrics.latestVersionHelper: No newer release is currently available.

statusDescriptions.idle: You can check for a newer release at any time.
statusDescriptions.checking: Contacting the update service and syncing release metadata.
statusDescriptions.up_to_date: This device is already on the latest release for the selected channel.
statusDescriptions.updateAvailable: Version {version} is available and ready to download.
statusDescriptions.downloading: The update package is downloading. Current progress: {percent}%.
statusDescriptions.downloaded: The update package is ready. Restart the app to install it.
statusDescriptions.installing: The application is preparing the update install.
statusDescriptions.error: The update flow could not complete. Try again in a moment.

release.title: Available release

release.emptyDescription: There is no newer release yet for the currently selected channel.

settings.title: Update settings
settings.description: Changing the release channel immediately triggers a fresh update check.
settings.channelHint: The formal channel favors stability. The preview channel receives features earlier.

details.title: Version details
details.description: Confirm the installed version, selected channel, and current update state.

environment.unsupported: This environment does not support in-app download and install updates. Version details and release notes are still available.

values.noReleaseNotes: No release summary is available for the current version.

header.title: Workspace Connections

header.subtitle: Maintain the project registry, lifecycle, and advanced configuration summaries from one surface.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create a project to manage workspace delivery scope here.

hints.resourceDirectoryLocal: For local connections, choose the project's resource directory from the system file picker.
hints.resourceDirectoryRemote: For remote connections, choose the project's resource directory from the remote directory browser.
hints.totalTokens: Set the total token limit available to this project.
hints.usedTokens: This value is read-only and reflects current project token consumption.
hints.models: Projects can only refine models selected here.
hints.defaultModel: This default seeds the project-level default model selection.
hints.tools: Choose builtin, skill, and mcp tools from the workspace catalog.
hints.agents: Choose workspace agents that this project can use.
hints.teams: Choose workspace agent teams that this project can use.

emptyAssignments.models: No workspace models are available yet.
emptyAssignments.tools: No workspace tools are available yet.
emptyAssignments.agents: No workspace agents are available yet.
emptyAssignments.teams: No workspace teams are available yet.

errors.lastActiveProject: Keep at least one active project. The last active project cannot be archived.
errors.seedRuntime: The project was created, but the initial advanced configuration could not be saved.

presets.hint: Presets only seed suggested values for a new project. You can still refine everything later in Project Settings.
presets.editHint: Use Project Settings for advanced edits on an existing project. Presets only apply during creation.

general.label: General project
general.description: Keep creation minimal, then enable models, tools, and actors later from Project Settings.

engineering.label: Engineering project
engineering.description: Pre-grant common models, tools, and actors so an engineering project can start faster.

documentation.label: Documentation project
documentation.description: Bias toward writing models and knowledge-friendly tools while keeping the surface lighter.

advanced.label: Advanced custom
advanced.description: Skip extra seeding and configure everything manually afterward.

summary.title: Configuration Summary
summary.currentDescription: This page only shows the summary. Advanced capability editing lives in Project Settings.
summary.createDescription: Create the project with the minimum required fields first. Refine advanced capability settings afterward.
summary.inheritanceDescription: Tools inherit the workspace enabled set by default, while agents and teams inherit the workspace active set. Project settings then apply exclusions and runtime disables.
summary.advancedDescription: Models, tools, actors, members, and access are edited from Project Settings.
summary.actorsInheritedValue: {count} workspace actors / teams inherited by default

leader.hint: Optional. Choose an active workspace agent now, or update it later from Project Settings.

manager.title: Project manager
manager.description: Assign the human owner for this project registry entry. Full project metadata still lives in Project Settings.
manager.label: Manager
manager.saveError: Failed to save the project manager.

deletionRequest.title: Deletion request
deletionRequest.description: Archived projects must pass a deletion approval request before final cleanup can run.
deletionRequest.createError: Failed to create the project deletion request.
deletionRequest.reviewError: Failed to review the project deletion request.

created.title: Project created
created.body: "{projectName}" was created and is ready for advanced setup.

header.title: Team orchestration

empty.title: No teams yet
empty.description: Create a team to manage workspace coordination groups and member scope here.

header.title: Access Control
header.description: Review workspace identities, access bindings, policies, and audit posture from one workbench.
header.personalDescription: Handle members and everyday access first, then open governance when it is actually needed.
header.teamDescription: Manage members and access first, then expand into governance only where the workspace has grown into it.
header.enterpriseDescription: This workspace is operating with full governance depth, including organization, policy, and audit controls.

bulk.dialogDescription: Only the currently selected records will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

toolbar.search: Search names, usernames, roles, or org units

list.title: Users
list.emptyDescription: No user records match the current filters.

detail.subtitle: Maintain the selected user's identity, password lifecycle, and access summary.
detail.emptyDescription: Choose a user from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.

fields.resetPassword: Require password reset on next sign-in

dialogs.createDescription: Create the identity and set the initial password. Org assignments and role bindings are maintained on other pages.
dialogs.deleteDescription: This removes the user's identity record from the current workspace and cannot be undone.

validation.passwordRequired: An initial password is required when creating a user.

toolbar.search: Search role name, code, or permissions

list.title: Roles
list.emptyDescription: No role records match the current filters.

detail.subtitle: Edit role definitions and capability bindings. Subject bindings stay in Permissions & Policies.
detail.emptyDescription: Choose a role from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.

dialogs.createDescription: Create the role definition and bind capabilities here. Subject bindings stay on Permissions & Policies.
dialogs.deleteDescription: Deleting the role removes the target from existing subject-role relationships.

validation.required: Enter both the role code and role name.

units.toolbarSearch: Search unit name, code, or parent
units.detailSubtitle: Edit unit code, hierarchy, and status.
units.emptyDescription: Choose a unit from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.
units.noListDescription: No unit records match the current filters.
units.dialogDescription: Create an org unit and define its hierarchy and status.

positions.detailSubtitle: Positions extend org assignments and role binding scope.
positions.emptyDescription: Choose a position from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.
positions.noListDescription: No position records match the current filters.
positions.dialogDescription: Create a position definition for org assignments.

groups.detailSubtitle: User groups extend subject grouping and authorization range.
groups.emptyDescription: Choose a group from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.
groups.noListDescription: No group records match the current filters.
groups.dialogDescription: Create a user group for organizational and authorization aggregation.

assignments.toolbarSearch: Search users, units, positions, or groups
assignments.detailSubtitle: Maintain each user's primary or secondary unit, positions, and groups.
assignments.emptyDescription: Choose an assignment from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.
assignments.noListDescription: No assignments match the current filters.
assignments.dialogDescription: Assign a user to an org unit with optional positions and groups.

validation.unitRequired: Enter both the unit code and unit name.
validation.positionRequired: Enter both the position code and position name.
validation.groupRequired: Enter both the user group code and user group name.
validation.assignmentRequired: Choose both a user and an org unit.

feedback.rootUnitDeleteBlockedBody: The root unit is the fixed starting point of the org tree and cannot be removed.
feedback.parentUnitDeleteBlockedBody: {name} still has child units. Remove the descendants first.

permissions.toolbarSearch: Search permission name, code, or resource type
permissions.detailSubtitle: The directory is read-only and shows capability references and resource mappings.
permissions.emptyDescription: Choose a permission from the list to review details.
permissions.noListDescription: No permission definitions match the current filters.
permissions.grantMatrixEmpty: The current subject has no effective resource action grants.

bindings.detailSubtitle: Subjects inherit capability sets through role bindings.
bindings.emptyDescription: Choose a binding from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.
bindings.noListDescription: No role bindings match the current filters.
bindings.dialogDescription: Bind a role to a subject and define the allow or deny effect.

data.toolbarSearch: Search policy name, subject, resource type, or scope
data.detailSubtitle: Define data access boundaries with projects, tags, and classifications.
data.emptyDescription: Choose a policy from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.
data.noListDescription: No data policies match the current filters.
data.dialogDescription: Define data access boundaries with subject, resource type, and scope conditions.

hints.projectIds: Separate multiple project IDs with commas.

resources.detailSubtitle: Object-level policies control actions on concrete resources and tools.
resources.emptyDescription: Choose a policy from the list to review details, or create one from the toolbar.
resources.noListDescription: No resource policies match the current filters.
resources.dialogDescription: Define allow or deny behavior for a concrete resource object.

validation.bindingRequired: Choose both a role and a subject.
validation.dataRequired: Enter a policy name and choose a subject.
validation.resourceRequired: Choose a subject, choose a resource, and enter an action.

toolbar.search: Search menu name, route, or feature code

header.title: Personal Center

profile.permissionSubtitle: Review the capabilities currently inherited by this account, grouped by target type.

profile.timelineSubtitle: Key actions recently performed by this account in the workspace.
profile.emptyTimelineDescription: There is no recent activity to show for this account yet.

metrics.permissionHelper: Total permissions inherited by the current account.

metrics.roleHelper: Roles currently assigned to this account.

profile.emptyDescription: The active workspace connection has not returned a current user yet.

access.title: Access Overview
access.description: Review the roles, permissions, and visible menus currently inherited by this account.

access.permissionsDescription: Effective permissions aggregated from the current roles.
access.menusDescription: Workspace navigation visible to the current account.

edit.title: Edit Profile
edit.description: Update the current signed-in user's basic profile. This release supports display name, username, and avatar upload.

hints.avatar: Choose a local PNG, JPEG, or WEBP image. Clearing it falls back to initials.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Enter your current password and set a new sign-in password. The password state updates immediately after success.

hints.newPassword: The new password must be at least 8 characters and different from the current password.

validation.newPasswordMinLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
validation.passwordUnchanged: The new password must be different from the current password.

runtime.title: Runtime Config
runtime.description: Edit your personal runtime override for the current workspace.
runtime.effectiveDescription: Preview the runtime config that will apply to new sessions for your user.

pet.title: Pet
pet.description: Configure Xiao Zhang's personal preferences for the current workspace, including the default model and permission mode.
pet.emptyDescription: The current workspace has not returned an editable user session context yet.

hints.model: Controls which configured model the pet chat uses by default.
hints.permissionMode: Controls the default execution permission requested by pet sessions.

stats.title: Pet overview
stats.description: Review the current pet's status, visible assets, and recent interaction state for this account.

helpers.memory: Memory currently bound to the home pet session.

preferences.reminderDescription: Control how long reminders stay visible and when quiet hours should suppress them.

runtime.title: Pet runtime preview
